ticket.subject: Order n°#121561
ticket.description:
Hello,

I would like to ask for your help

 regarding an issue I encountered while generating a shipping label for order #121561. The system displays the following error message:

"The tax ID number and/or CNPJ/CPF is invalid. Please contact support."


Could you please help me resolve this issue or advise on how to proceed?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best,
Anna

comments.body:
Hi Anna,

Greetings from PluginHive!

Thank you for reaching out.

Upon checking Order #121561, I can see that the label generation is failing with the following error:
“The tax ID number and/or CNPJ/CPF is invalid. Please contact support.”

Could you please cross-check the CNPJ/CPF number (14556238730) provided for the customer and try generating the label again? This may be occurring due to an invalid or incorrect tax ID number.

Please let us know how it goes or if you need any further assistance.
 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/Yj5UKtrPPxhRaeg9kJOsATNAn/?name=Screenshot+2026-04-13+at+4.21.02%E2%80%AFPM.png)
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
France store
$99 plan
FedEx added
using the app for rates and labels
Customer states that they are receiving the error "The tax ID number and/or CNPJ/CPF is invalid. Please contact support." while trying to generate the label for order ID: #121561
Upon checking recipient address is from brazil  and the tax ID number is being passed from shopify however the label is not generated due to above error.
I checked this case with keerthi and replying to customer accordingly.

keeping on hold for now
